purpose: Manual review list for Standard cards whose effects may require deck-tracker history state beyond remaining deck count.

source.note: Death Knight class is corrected from raw hsdata CLASS=1 because generated CardDef currently maps CLASS=1 to NEUTRAL.

criteria.caveat: This is an intentionally inclusive candidate list for human review; medium-priority Deathrattle/death-event rows may not all require special tracker logic.

cards.cardTextZhCN: 抽一张法术牌。注能（@）：将它的一张临时复制置入你的手牌。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 抽一张法术牌。注能（）：将它的一张临时复制置入你的手牌。

text.zhCN: 抽一张法术牌。注能（@）：将它的一张临时复制置入你的手牌。
text.enUS: [x]Draw a spell. Infuse_(@): Add a Temporary copy of it to your hand.
text.zhCNPlain: 抽一张法术牌。注能（）：将它的一张临时复制置入你的手牌。
text.enUSPlain: [x]Draw a spell. Infuse_(): Add a Temporary copy of it to your hand.

matchReasons: Infuse/灌注/注能 depends on friendly deaths while the card is in hand

cards.cardTextZhCN: 奥秘：当一个友方随从死亡时，将其移回你的手牌，它的法力值消耗减少（2）点。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 奥秘：当一个友方随从死亡时，将其移回你的手牌，它的法力值消耗减少（2）点。

text.zhCN: 奥秘：当一个友方随从死亡时，将其移回你的手牌，它的法力值消耗减少（2）点。
text.enUS: Secret: When a friendly minion dies, return it to your hand. It costs (2) less.
text.zhCNPlain: 奥秘：当一个友方随从死亡时，将其移回你的手牌，它的法力值消耗减少（2）点。
text.enUSPlain: Secret: When a friendly minion dies, return it to your hand. It costs (2) less.

matchReasons: text reacts to death/destruction events

cards.cardTextZhCN: 选择一个随从，在另一个敌方随从死亡后将其消灭。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 选择一个随从，在另一个敌方随从死亡后将其消灭。

text.enUS: Choose a minion. Destroy it after another enemy minion dies.
text.zhCNPlain: 选择一个随从，在另一个敌方随从死亡后将其消灭。
text.enUSPlain: Choose a minion. Destroy it after another enemy minion dies.

matchReasons: text reacts to death/destruction events

cards.cardTextZhCN: 抽一张牌。如果这张牌有亡语，则再次施放本法术。
cards.cardTextZhCNPlain: 抽一张牌。如果这张牌有亡语，则再次施放本法术。

text.zhCN: 抽一张牌。如果这张牌有亡语，则再次施放本法术。

reviewFields.rank: 1-based order within this class JSON file after the current sort.
reviewFields.cardRank: Alias of rank for manual review tools that expect cardRank.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCN: Original Simplified Chinese rules text, including markup.
reviewFields.cardTextZhCNPlain: Simplified Chinese rules text with markup stripped for easier reading.
